commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer handling and missing contributor real behavior proof are the blockers; there is no narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to queue.; Cleared: The current diff changes only Doctor CLI TypeScript source/tests and does not include package, lockfile, workflow, install-script, credential, or third-party code execution changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a structured Doctor health check for extra gateway-like services, threads `--deep` into `doctor --lint`, and keeps real legacy gateway service cleanup on the existing positional `doctor --fix` path.

PR surface: Source +88, Tests +134. Total +222 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/reporting PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection verifies current main lacks the structured extra-service health check and the PR diff adds it.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer handling and missing contributor real behavior proof are the blockers; there is no narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to queue.

target.title: Doctor: expose extra gateway service findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes extra gateway-like services as a structured doctor health check for lint and dry-run repair effects.
- Keeps real legacy gateway cleanup on the existing positional doctor gateway-services flow used by openclaw doctor --fix.
- Keeps gateway service config repair, token drift, entrypoint rewrite, live-service safety, and platform notes on the existing paths for now.

This is the small version of the old gateway-services PR. It does not move the full gateway service config repair into structured repair. The existing extra-service scan now shares its detector with the health registry, honors --deep in lint, and dry-run reports cleanup effects only for legacy services.

## Verification

- pnpm install
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/health-checks.ts
- node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/health-checks.ts
- git diff --check origin/main..HEAD
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=verbose - 3 files, 48 tests
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose - 1 file, 21 tests
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts --reporter=verbose - 1 file, 5 tests
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts --reporter=verbose - 1 file, 11 tests
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false
- bash /mnt/c/src/claws-hapi/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main - clean after fixing accepted --deep finding

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: openclaw doctor --lint can report extra gateway-like services, including --deep scans, and dry-run repair output can describe legacy cleanup without taking over the real cleanup path.
Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu 24.04, Node 24.15.0, OpenClaw source checkout based on current origin/main.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused gateway-services/doctor lint/doctor repair Vitest files, focused oxfmt/oxlint, core tsgo, core test tsgo, and autoreview as listed above.
Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed with 6 files and 85 tests total; both tsgo lanes exited 0; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings after --deep propagation was fixed.
Observed result after fix: extra gateway services are registered as core/doctor/gateway-services/extra; lint/dry-run can see structured findings/effects, while broad structured fix skips this id so existing positional gateway cleanup remains the only real mutating path.
What was not tested: live removal of a real launchd/systemd gateway service was not run because this PR preserves the existing cleanup command path and only adds structured reporting around its detector.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
